testcase.name: test_apple_pay_fee_precision
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_payment_methods_fees.py:172: in test_apple_pay_fee_precision assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Apple Pay order failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Apple Pay order failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_order_total_includes_fee_for_apple_pay
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_payment_methods_fees.py:184: in test_order_total_includes_fee_for_apple_pay assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Apple Pay order failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Apple Pay order failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_payment_method_name_preserved
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_payment_methods_fees.py:196: in test_payment_method_name_preserved assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Order failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Order failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
